case_title: RUTH HOOVER et al VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-02-2013 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
